scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) delegates to Reader overload with non-empty HTML
pseudocode:
Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); String html = "

Hello

"; String base = "http://example.com";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) returns Document for empty input
scenarios.expectedResult: return Document whose body().text() is empty string
pseudocode: TEST TC02_O2 parseInput Reader overload empty
Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Reader rdr = new StringReader(""); String base = "base";

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) throws NullPointerException when html is null
pseudocode: Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); String html = null; String base = "u";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) propagates exception from TreeBuilder.parse
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = new Parser(new StubTreeBuilder()); // stub throws IllegalStateException in parse
pseudocode: class StubTreeBuilder extends TreeBuilder { StubTreeBuilder(){super(null);} public Document parse(Reader in, String uri, Parser p){throw new IllegalStateException("fail");} } Parser parser = new Parser(new StubTreeBuilder()); Reader rdr = new StringReader("x"); String base="u";
